heading: cyHave you already applied for help with your counterclaim fee?
question: cyHave you already applied for help with your counterclaim fee?
revealedHwfQuestionLabel: cyEnter your Help with Fees reference number
revealedHwfQuestionHint: cyYou will have received this number when you applied for Help with Fees. This reference must not have been used for a previous application.cyFor example, HWF-A1B-23C
